Section text:
## 小游戏与APP正在重新构建“多端协同”战略

message.content: This section addresses the strategic realignment between mini-games and native applications, focusing on the development of a "multi-terminal collaboration" framework. It can answer retrieval questions regarding: (1) Topics & Claims: The current industry trend of integrating mini-games with APPs to rebuild cross-platform synergy; (2) Key Entities: Mini-games, APPs, and multi-terminal ecosystems. The provided excerpt consists solely of a section heading and does not contain specific dates, formal definitions, operational procedures, quantitative metrics, tables, figures, or cited evidence types.
